scripts.preinstall: node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json') } catch(e){} try { require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock') } catch(e){} if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.startsWith('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1) }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
